name: co-dialectic
description: Co-Dialectic v4.10.0 — TypeScript+Bun fish swarm (handler.ts + claude-code.ts + agent-lifecycle.ts). Fixes stuck background agents: Python polled wrong output path; TS relies on agent-injected complete command + timeout. P4 three-layer architecture compliant. LLM prompt optimizer + auto-verify by stakes + semantic T3 classification + background agent lifecycle manager. Cross-family judge panel, hallucination detector, fish-swarm orchestration. Works with any LLM runtime.
